purpose: Define the sanitized evidence needed to prove Android Chrome and iOS Safari PWA install, home-screen launch, offline relaunch, update banner, and beginner mobile layout before using PWA as the main external pilot channel.

officialReferences.name: MDN Making PWAs installable
officialReferences.whyItMatters: The installed experience depends on a valid manifest, HTTPS origin, icons, and service worker behavior.

officialReferences.name: web.dev PWA installation
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Install prompts and home-screen launch behavior vary by browser and should be verified on real devices.

officialReferences.name: Chrome installable manifest audit
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Chrome installability checks depend on manifest fields, icons, and service worker availability.

officialReferences.name: MDN Service Worker API
officialReferences.whyItMatters: Offline navigation and update behavior rely on service worker lifecycle correctness.

requiredDevices.minimumVersionPolicy: Use a current stable Android Chrome on a real phone or trusted emulator.
mustCapture: browser install entry or install prompt
bottom navigation and beginner cards on first screen
update banner after a deployed update

requiredDevices.minimumVersionPolicy: Use a current stable iOS Safari on iPhone; add iPad after phone evidence is clean.
mustCapture: in-app Add to Home Screen guidance
Safari Share menu path or tester note

steps: Open https://www.zkraiflow.top/ in Android Chrome.
Install from the browser install UI or in-app prompt.
Launch from the home-screen icon.
Confirm the first screen is the beginner large-button mobile home.
expectedEvidence: install prompt or browser install menu screenshot

steps: Open https://www.zkraiflow.top/ in iOS Safari.
Confirm Add to Home Screen guidance is visible.
Use Share > Add to Home Screen.
Launch from the home-screen icon and inspect safe areas.
expectedEvidence: Add to Home Screen guidance screenshot

steps: Open home, create, assets, and settings while online.
Turn on airplane mode.
Relaunch the installed PWA.
Confirm cached shell or offline page is understandable and online-only actions are not presented as submitted.
Launch the iOS home-screen app.
Open Settings.
Open support, privacy, AI disclosure, and account deletion pages.
Return to the app after each page.
Install or open the current PWA.
Deploy a build with a changed service worker cache version.
Reload once and wait for update detection.
Tap the update banner and confirm one clean reload.
expectedEvidence: tester note confirming a single reload

steps: Sign in with the review-safe account on the production origin.
Close the installed PWA.
Launch from the home-screen icon again.
Confirm session state and protected app paths behave as expected.

sampleEvidenceRecord.notes: Short sanitized note. Do not include private notifications, account secrets, or user uploads.

closeoutGates: Android install, home-screen icon, standalone launch, and offline relaunch evidence are captured.
iOS Add to Home Screen, home-screen launch, safe-area, and public legal/support evidence are captured.
PWA update banner is verified in at least one deployment cycle before public pilot expansion.
Authenticated relaunch remains blocked until review account and authenticated smoke evidence exist.
Any failed P0 case is copied into store/release-blockers-register.json before inviting more testers.
